instruction: Draft a legal demand letter based on the scenario.
input: A tenant paid a $2,500 security deposit. After moving out, the landlord refused to return the deposit and did not provide an itemized explanation of damages.
output:
Dear [Landlord Name],

I represent [Tenant Name] regarding the failure to return a $2,500 security deposit following move-out from the rental property. My client vacated the premises, and despite the passage of the required time, you neither returned the deposit nor provided an itemized statement explaining any lawful deductions.

This retention of funds without proper accounting may violate applicable landlord-tenant obligations. My client demands payment of the full $2,500 deposit within 14 days of your receipt of this letter. Please respond in writing by that date; otherwise my client will have no choice but to consider formal action to recover the deposit.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Write a professional demand letter for the dispute described below.
input: A freelance designer completed branding work for a business, delivered the final files, and submitted an invoice for $3,200. The business used the work but never paid.
output:
Dear [Client Name],

I represent [Designer Name] regarding the completed branding and design services provided to your business. My client delivered the agreed work product and submitted an invoice for $3,200, yet payment remains outstanding despite your use of the final materials.

Accepting and using the work without payment constitutes a breach of the parties' agreement. My client demands payment of the full $3,200 within 7 business days of receipt of this letter. Failure to remit payment by that date will leave my client no option but to pursue collection and any applicable legal remedies.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Draft a demand letter based on the following facts.
input: A homeowner paid a contractor $8,000 for roof repairs. The contractor performed only partial work, stopped responding, and never completed the job.
output:
Dear [Contractor Name],

I represent [Homeowner Name] regarding the roofing repair project for which you received $8,000. Although payment was made in full, you performed only partial work and failed to complete the agreed repairs, and you have ceased responding to requests for completion or refund.

This failure to perform may constitute breach of contract. My client demands that you either complete the work or refund the amount paid for incomplete work within 7 days of receipt of this letter. If we do not receive a written response and resolution by that date, my client intends to pursue all available remedies, including a claim for damages.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Prepare a formal demand letter for this legal dispute.
input: A customer bought a refrigerator that stopped working within days. The seller ignored repeated requests for repair or refund, and the customer lost several hundred dollars in spoiled food.
output:
Dear [Seller Name],

I represent [Customer Name] regarding the purchase of a refrigerator that became nonfunctional within days of delivery. Despite repeated requests for assistance, you have failed to provide a repair, replacement, or refund. As a result, my client incurred additional losses, including spoiled food and replacement expenses.

Your failure to address this defective product may violate consumer protection and warranty obligations. My client demands a full refund or replacement of the refrigerator, plus reimbursement for documented related losses, within 21 days of your receipt of this letter. Please contact us in writing by that date; otherwise we will advise our client on filing a claim in small claims court or other appropriate venue.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Draft a legal demand letter for the scenario below.
input: An employee worked overtime for several weeks but was not paid the additional wages. The employer ignored the employee's written requests for correction.
output:
Dear [Employer Name],

I represent [Employee Name] regarding unpaid overtime wages for work performed over several weeks. My client worked hours beyond the regular schedule but did not receive the compensation due despite written requests seeking correction.

Failure to pay earned wages may violate wage payment obligations and has caused financial harm to my client. My client demands payment of all unpaid overtime compensation within 7 days of receipt of this letter, together with written confirmation that future wage payments will comply with applicable requirements. If payment is not made, my client may pursue further legal action.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Write a structured demand letter seeking compensation based on the facts provided.
input: A neighbor's plumbing overflow caused water damage to the claimant's ceiling, walls, and flooring. Repair costs were estimated at $4,800, and the neighbor refused to pay.
output:
Dear [Neighbor Name],

I represent [Claimant Name] regarding the water damage caused to my client's property when plumbing overflow from your unit resulted in damage to the ceiling, walls, and flooring. Repair estimates currently total $4,800, and you have refused to compensate my client for these losses.

Your failure to resolve this matter may expose you to liability for property damage caused by your negligence. My client demands payment of $4,800 within 14 days of your receipt of this letter. If payment is not made within that time, my client may pursue all available legal remedies.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Draft a professional demand letter based on the scenario provided.
input: A consultant provided six months of marketing consulting services to a startup and invoiced $7,500. The startup acknowledged the work but has not paid the invoice.
output:
Dear [Startup Name],

I represent [Consultant Name] regarding marketing consulting services provided to your company over a six-month period. My client delivered the agreed services and submitted an invoice in the amount of $7,500. Despite your acknowledgment of the work, payment has not been made.

Nonpayment for accepted services is a breach of the parties' agreement. My client demands payment of the full $7,500 within 21 days of receipt of this letter. Kindly remit payment or contact us with a proposed resolution by that date; otherwise we will recommend that our client pursue collection and any applicable legal action.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Write a formal demand letter seeking payment based on the facts below.
input: A photographer completed wedding photography services and delivered the edited photos to the client, but the client has not paid the remaining $2,800 balance.
output:
Dear [Client Name],

I represent [Photographer Name] regarding wedding photography services provided under your agreement. My client fulfilled all obligations by photographing the event and delivering the completed edited photographs. The outstanding balance of $2,800 remains unpaid.

Retaining the benefit of the delivered work without paying the balance constitutes a breach of the service agreement. My client demands payment of $2,800 within 7 days of your receipt of this letter. If we do not receive payment or a written response by that date, my client reserves the right to refer this matter for collection or to file a claim for the balance due.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Prepare a legal demand letter for the following dispute.
input: A tenant repeatedly notified the landlord about severe mold and water leaks in the apartment. The landlord ignored repair requests for months.
output:
Dear [Landlord Name],

I represent [Tenant Name] regarding unsafe living conditions at the rental property, including ongoing water leaks and mold growth that were reported to you multiple times. Despite repeated written requests for repair, these conditions remain unresolved.

Failure to maintain habitable premises may breach your obligations under the lease and applicable law. My client demands that you complete the necessary repairs and provide written confirmation of the repair schedule within 14 days of receipt of this letter. If the conditions are not corrected by that time, my client will consider exercising all rights under the lease and applicable housing laws, including withholding rent or seeking redress in court.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Draft a structured demand letter addressing the dispute described.
input: A homeowner paid a landscaping company $3,500 to install a patio. The company never began the work and stopped responding to messages.
output:
Dear [Company Name],

I represent [Homeowner Name] regarding the landscaping services for which you received payment of $3,500 to install a patio. Despite receiving payment, you have not begun the agreed work and have stopped responding to communications.

Failure to perform after receiving payment is a breach of contract. My client demands a full refund of the $3,500 within 7 days of your receipt of this letter. If the refund is not issued by that date, my client will have no alternative but to pursue recovery of the funds through appropriate legal channels.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Write a professional demand letter requesting compensation.
input: A customer ordered custom furniture online for $4,200. The company delivered a different product and refused to provide a refund.
output:
Dear [Company Name],

I represent [Customer Name] regarding the purchase of custom furniture for $4,200. The product delivered did not match the item ordered. Despite multiple requests, your company has refused to provide a refund or replacement.

Delivery of nonconforming goods may breach the contract and violate consumer protection standards. My client demands a full refund of $4,200 within 14 days of receipt of this letter. Please respond in writing; if we do not receive a satisfactory resolution by that date, my client will consider filing a complaint with the relevant consumer agency and pursuing a claim for refund and damages.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Prepare a demand letter based on the following dispute.
input: A real estate agent earned a $5,500 commission for closing a property sale, but the brokerage has not paid the commission.
output:
Dear [Brokerage Name],

I represent [Agent Name] regarding the real estate commission earned from the closing of the recent property transaction. My client fulfilled all obligations and facilitated the successful closing of the sale, resulting in a commission of $5,500.

Despite completion of the transaction, the commission remains unpaid. Nonpayment of earned compensation may breach the brokerage agreement. My client demands payment of the $5,500 commission within 21 days of receipt of this letter. If payment is not received by that date, my client reserves the right to pursue all remedies under the agreement and applicable law.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Draft a formal legal demand letter using the facts below.
input: A borrower received a $4,000 personal loan from a friend with an agreement to repay within six months. The borrower has not repaid any of the loan.
output:
Dear [Borrower Name],

I represent [Lender Name] regarding the personal loan of $4,000 provided to you with the understanding that the amount would be repaid within six months. The agreed repayment period has passed and the loan remains unpaid.

Failure to repay as agreed is a breach of your repayment obligation. My client demands payment of the full $4,000 balance within 14 days of receipt of this letter. If payment is not received by that date, my client will consider referring this matter for collection or taking such other steps as may be necessary to recover the debt.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Write a legal demand letter for the situation described.
input: A gym continued charging monthly membership fees after the customer canceled the membership and provided written notice.
output:
Dear [Gym Name],

I represent [Customer Name] regarding unauthorized membership charges that continued after my client properly canceled the gym membership and provided written notice of cancellation.

Despite confirmation of the cancellation, your company continued billing monthly membership fees. These charges are unauthorized. My client demands reimbursement of all improperly charged fees within 7 days of receipt of this letter. If reimbursement is not made by that date, my client will consider disputing the charges with the card issuer and pursuing any other available remedies.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]

instruction: Prepare a professional demand letter based on the dispute described.
input: A small business delivered printed merchandise worth $6,300 to a retailer, but the retailer has not paid the invoice.
output:
Dear [Retailer Name],

I represent [Business Name] regarding merchandise delivered to your store pursuant to your purchase order. The goods were delivered as agreed, and an invoice in the amount of $6,300 was issued. Payment has not been received.

Nonpayment for delivered goods is a breach of the parties' agreement. My client demands payment of the full $6,300 within 14 days of receipt of this letter. Please remit payment or contact us with a proposed payment plan by that date; otherwise we will advise our client to pursue collection and any applicable legal action for the outstanding balance.

Sincerely,
[Sender Name]
